description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image griest/karma-full-test-env:latest, with a Yarn cache at /usr/local/share/.config/yarn/global/node_modules and node_modules caches, and a before_script that runs `yarn global add lerna`, lists the global node_modules directory, and executes `npm run bootstrap` for every job. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a lint job that runs `npm run lint`, and a test job that runs `npm run test` and always stores the `test/reports/` directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a build job that runs `lerna run build`, saves the `dist/` and `src/*/dist` directories as artifacts, and is limited to tags, the master branch, or the v3 branch. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on the test job, runs `cp -r test/reports public` and a `sed -i -e 's/<head>/<head><script type="application\/javascript" src="https:\/\/unpkg.com\/iframe-resizer@3.5.14\/js\/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js"><\/script>/g' public/reports/{unit,coverage/lcov-report}/index.html` command to inject an iframe‑resizer script, publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch; also add a publish job that depends on the build job, writes an npm auth token from the NPM_TOKEN variable to `~/.npmrc`, runs `lerna run publish`, and only runs on tags to publish the packages to npm.
